author: D23 RSS
text:
Meet the Characters of Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story 5

Get reacquainted with favorites and introduced to a host of new faces—including Lilypad (voiced by Greta Lee) and Smarty Pants (voiced by Conan O’Brien)—before the film debuts in theaters on June 19!

The post Meet the Characters of Disney and Pixar’s <em>Toy Story 5</em> appeared first on D23.
